testcase.name: Route Smoke Tests › homepage loads correctly
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › smoke\routes.spec.js:4:5 › Route Smoke Tests › homepage loads correctly ─────────────
Error: Timed out 5000ms waiting for expect(locator).toBeVisible()
Locator: locator('nav') Expected: visible Received: <element(s) not found> Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('nav')
12 | 13 | // Check navigation exists > 14 | await expect(page.locator('nav')).toBeVisible(); | ^ 15 | 16 | // Check featured games section exists 17 | await expect(page.locator('[data-testid="featured-games"], .featured-games, [class*="game"]')).toBeVisible(); at C:\Website Development\AIGameWebsite\tests\smoke\routes.spec.js:14:43
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\smoke-routes-Route-Smoke-Tests-homepage-loads-correctly-chromium\test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\smoke-routes-Route-Smoke-Tests-homepage-loads-correctly-chromium\video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ..\test-results\smoke-routes-Route-Smoke-Tests-homepage-loads-correctly-chromium\error-context.md

testcase.name: Route Smoke Tests › games page loads correctly
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › smoke\routes.spec.js:20:5 › Route Smoke Tests › games page loads correctly ──────────
Error: Timed out 5000ms waiting for expect(locator).toBeVisible()
Locator: locator('[data-testid="game-card"], .game-card, [class*="game"][class*="card"]') Expected: visible Received: <element(s) not found> Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('[data-testid="game-card"], .game-card, [class*="game"][class*="card"]')

attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\smoke-routes-Route-Smoke-Tests-games-page-loads-correctly-chromium\test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.name: Route Smoke Tests › about page loads correctly
Route Smoke Tests › individual game pages load for active games
Route Smoke Tests › coming soon games redirect to games page
Route Smoke Tests › invalid game routes return 404
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › smoke\routes.spec.js:72:5 › Route Smoke Tests › invalid game routes return 404 ────── Error: expect.toContainText: Error: strict mode violation: locator('h1, main') resolved to 2 elements: 1)
…
aka getByRole('main') 2)

↵ 404 ERROR↵

aka getByRole('heading', { name: 'ERROR' }) Call log: - Expect "toContainText" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('h1, main') 74 | 75 | // Should be 404 page > 76 | await expect(page.locator('h1, main')).toContainText(/404|Not Found|Error/); | ^ 77 | }); 78 | 79 | test('API health endpoint works', async ({ page }) => { at C:\Website Development\AIGameWebsite\tests\smoke\routes.spec.js:76:48 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\smoke-routes-Route-Smoke-T-f290a-alid-game-routes-return-404-chromium\test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\smoke-routes-Route-Smoke-T-f290a-alid-game-routes-return-404-chromium\video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ..\test-results\smoke-routes-Route-Smoke-T-f290a-alid-game-routes-return-404-chromium\error-context.md
